name: Northwestern University
meets_full_need_notes: Northwestern meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic undergraduates. No-loan policy for families earning under $75,000.
no_loan_notes: Families with income below $75,000 receive loan-free packages. Above $75,000, loans may be included up to modest amounts. University also eliminated loans for families under $40,000 with enhanced grants.
ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive the same need-based financial aid as RD applicants. Northwestern's aid policy is identical across decision rounds.
appeal_policy: Students may request a professional judgment review through the Office of Undergraduate Financial Aid with documentation of special circumstances.
